instruction: Separate daily collection from weekly report generation. Collection persists evidence without Bedrock, report rendering or subscriber delivery. Report mode reads persisted evidence in a calendar window. Use a rolling collection lookback and independent SAM parameters for collection and reporting.
required_invariants: DynamoDB conditional evidence writes remain idempotent
Locks include mode, window end and window length
Report schedule is disabled by default
No deployment occurs in this stage
stop_after: Return changed files, tests, deployment implications and open risks, then stop.
